caveats: Dev proof artifact; not a production Groth16 proof.
User-exported selective disclosure; the user chooses when and where to share it.
This packet is not a production view-key system and does not provide ongoing account surveillance.
Packet does not reveal private keys, note secrets, recipient secrets, or allowlist witness paths.
Mode A private-note-compatible handoff; no direct upstream pool credit is claimed.
CCTP settlement is proof-bound in the artifact, but this packet is not a legal or security audit.

verificationInstructions.title: Validate packet schema
verificationInstructions.description: Parse the JSON with @nebula/core AuditorPacketSchema before relying on any field.
verificationInstructions.expected: The packet has version 1, required hashes, at least one caveat, and verification instructions.

verificationInstructions.title: Confirm CCTP settlement
verificationInstructions.description: Compare the CCTP message hash, attestation hash, and nonce against the Circle Iris message used for the Stellar mint.
verificationInstructions.expected: The Nebula journal and auditor packet bind to the same CCTP burn/mint message.

verificationInstructions.title: Confirm source lock
verificationInstructions.description: Compare sourceChainId, sourceTxHash, and sourceLogIndex against the source-chain receipt or deterministic fixture.
verificationInstructions.expected: The referenced log is the canonical NebulaEscrow Locked event for this claim.

verificationInstructions.title: Confirm proof binding
verificationInstructions.description: Compare proofImageId and journalDigest against the proof artifact supplied to NebulaRelay.
verificationInstructions.expected: The proof artifact commits to the same note commitment, nullifier, event commitment, and compliance root.

verificationInstructions.title: Confirm Stellar claim
verificationInstructions.description: Check the Stellar claim transaction when one is present, then confirm the nullifier is stored once.
verificationInstructions.expected: A replay with the same claimNullifier fails with NebulaRelay's replay protection.

verificationInstructions.title: Review disclosure caveats
verificationInstructions.description: Read every caveat before treating this as audit evidence.
verificationInstructions.expected: The packet is user-controlled selective disclosure, not production view-key disclosure.
